workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: I have this email thread from Iron Creek Mining that needs build the analysis. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 17:09 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining executive brief

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 13:30 EST
Subject: URGENT: executive brief Issue at Iron Creek Mining

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
